title: Showroom Management System
shortDesc: Full-featured vehicle showroom management with inventory, sales tracking, and customer management.
overview: A comprehensive showroom management platform built for car dealerships to streamline inventory, sales, and customer relationships.
purpose: Designed to replace manual spreadsheet workflows at dealerships with a modern digital solution.

title: Restaurant Management System
shortDesc: End-to-end restaurant operations: orders, menu, staff, and reporting in one dashboard.
overview: A full-stack restaurant management system that digitizes table ordering, kitchen display, and billing.
purpose: Built to help local restaurants modernize their operations and reduce order errors.

title: Factory Management System
shortDesc: Production floor management with resource planning, worker tracking, and output analytics.
overview: Industrial factory management software covering production scheduling, raw material tracking, and quality control.
technologies: Also applied the concept of Ledger in this project
purpose: Aimed at small-to-medium factories transitioning from paper-based systems to digital workflows.

title: DealsFinder Platform
shortDesc: Smart deals aggregator that finds and compares the best prices across multiple e-commerce platforms.
overview: A price comparison and deals discovery platform that aggregates offers and alerts users to the best deals in real time.
purpose: Helps budget-conscious shoppers save money by surfacing hidden deals automatically.

title: Worker Finder Platform
shortDesc: Connects skilled workers with employers through a verified profiles and smart matching system.
overview: A labor marketplace platform that enables employers to find vetted workers and workers to find opportunities near them.
purpose: Addresses the informal labor market gap by digitizing how workers and employers connect.
